author: NoRi2909
text: Automations: Misleading description of Delay action

author: NoRi2909
text:
### Describe the issue you are experiencing

Currently the description of the Delay action is:

[frontend/src/translations/en.json](https://github.com/home-assistant/frontend/blob/7306b8c1026904aedbd7adb3b753fbc0739c0c7c/src/translations/en.json#L3362-L3364)

Lines 3362 to 3364
in
[7306b8c](/home-assistant/frontend/commit/7306b8c1026904aedbd7adb3b753fbc0739c0c7c)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | "description": { |
|  | "picker": "Wait some time to perform a sequence of actions.", |
|  | "full": "Delay {duration}", |

### Describe the behavior you expected

This is misleading as if the script is supposed to pause some time, waiting for some actions to complete.  
Instead it pauses the sequence of all following actions at this point.

Therefore this should be changed to:

```
Wait some time before continuing the sequence of actions.
```

*Note: Like with most of my bug reports here this is caused by the fact that literally translating the current English text into German makes the correct interpretation impossible. And that's what happened, causing the current German translation to be completely wrong (already fixed now).*

### What version of Home Assistant Core has the issue?

core-2024.11.0b5
